message:
The other day, I was in the kitchen trying to whip up dinner when I suddenly smelled something burning. My first thought? "Did I forget a pot on the stove?" I quickly checked, and thankfully, it was just my husband experimenting with a new grilling technique outside. 😂 

But in that moment of panic, I remembered how crucial it is to have a solid plan in place. While I was texting my family to check on their smoke alarms and share kitchen safety tips, I realized we really need to keep these conversations going. 

It's so easy to get caught up in the daily bustle, but ensuring everyone knows what to do in case of a fire is vital. This little refresher helped me reinforce our escape plan with the kids too. How do you keep your family in the loop about safety? 🏡💬
